title:
Module 1
The Basics
subtitle: Course Overview and the Complete Basics to Starting AI Models

blocks.content: The AI Influencer Method is a system for building and monetizing social media pages using AI-generated personas. These personas look, act, and engage like real influencers but are entirely created and managed through artificial intelligence tools. This is not about catfishing or deception. This is a business model. You are building a brand, not pretending to be a real person.

items: How to create an AI influencer from scratch
Which platforms to use and why
How to grow from zero to monetization
The exact content pipeline that works
How to scale to multiple pages
No physical limitations on content output
Consistent brand and persona across all content
Lower operating cost than real influencers
Full creative control over every aspect

right.content: Attention flows through a funnel. Free content creates interest. Interest creates followers. Followers convert to paying subscribers.

items: Tips and gifts from engaged fans

right.title: Critical Rule
right.content: Revenue comes from the funnel, not from posting. Chat quality determines profit more than follower count.

items: Instagram — Main traffic and brand hub
AI image generation tools + Kling for video
Separate phone or device per persona

right.title: IMAGE PLACEHOLDER
right.content: Visual funnel diagram showing traffic flow from social media to monetization

right.title: Mindset
right.content: This is a real business. The people who fail are the ones who skip steps, rush the process, or expect results without work. The window for early movers is open now.

summary_points: The AI Influencer Method is a real business that requires real effort and patience
Revenue comes from the funnel, not just from posting content
Instagram and Threads are mandatory primary platforms
Start with essential tools and add more as you scale
